notes: Preferred token source is the GitHub Actions repository secret VITE_MAPBOX_TOKEN, injected at build time. publicToken remains empty by default. Browser localStorage key journeylines.mapboxToken is retained only as a fallback for local testing. Driving routes use Mapbox Directions when a token is available; boat/train use manual overrides for now. v2.8 uses globe-anchored MapLibre symbol labels and refreshed route cache keys.
